variants: Rakel Steinthorsdottir is a Dance Therapy specialist who has achieved the Phoenix Handler Credential. She has pursued her professional interests while being an integral member of the Featherleaf Horticulture Circle, where she blends nature and wellness. Under the mentorship of Niklas Forsling, Rakel has crafted a unique approach to therapy that emphasizes movement in healing. Her projects receive substantial support from the Horizon Climber Consortium, allowing her to explore innovative therapeutic practices. Through her work, Rakel promotes the healing potential found in the intersection of dance and horticulture.
